auth.label: API Key
auth.description: IQAir AirVisual API key sent with the key query parameter. Create or copy a key from the IQAir API dashboard: https://www.iqair.com/dashboard/api.

actions.name: get_city_data
actions.description: Get current air quality and weather data for a specified supported city.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

state.description: The supported state English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

city.description: The supported city English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

inputSchema.description: Input for reading current data for one supported city.

city.description: The supported city English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

state.description: The supported state English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

name.description: The station name returned by IQAir AirVisual when available.

type.description: The GeoJSON location type returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: One coordinate value returned by IQAir AirVisual.

coordinates.description: Longitude and latitude coordinates returned by IQAir AirVisual.

location.description: The GeoJSON point returned by IQAir AirVisual.

weather.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

pollution.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

current.description: Current weather and pollution readings returned by IQAir AirVisual.

units.description: Measurement units keyed by pollutant or weather field returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

forecasts.description: Hourly forecast records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

forecasts_daily.description: Daily forecast records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

history.description: Historical weather and pollution records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

data.description: Current air quality and weather data for one city returned by IQAir AirVisual.

outputSchema.description: City data returned by IQAir AirVisual.

actions.name: get_nearest_city
actions.description: Get current air quality and weather data for the nearest supported city by IP or coordinates.

oneOf.description: Coordinate lookup input for the nearest supported IQAir AirVisual city.

inputSchema.description: Input for reading the nearest supported city. Omit both coordinates to use IP geolocation, or provide both latitude and longitude.

city.description: The supported city English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

state.description: The supported state English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

name.description: The station name returned by IQAir AirVisual when available.

type.description: The GeoJSON location type returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: One coordinate value returned by IQAir AirVisual.

coordinates.description: Longitude and latitude coordinates returned by IQAir AirVisual.

location.description: The GeoJSON point returned by IQAir AirVisual.

weather.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

pollution.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

current.description: Current weather and pollution readings returned by IQAir AirVisual.

units.description: Measurement units keyed by pollutant or weather field returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

forecasts.description: Hourly forecast records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: A plan-dependent object returned by IQAir AirVisual.

forecasts_daily.description: Daily forecast records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

history.description: Historical weather and pollution records returned by IQAir AirVisual.

data.description: Current air quality and weather data for one city returned by IQAir AirVisual.

outputSchema.description: City data returned by IQAir AirVisual.

actions.name: list_supported_cities
actions.description: List supported cities for a country and state with active IQAir AirVisual stations.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

state.description: The supported state English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing supported cities in one state.

city.description: The supported city English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: One city returned by IQAir AirVisual.

cities.description: Supported city objects returned by IQAir AirVisual.

count.description: Number of cities returned by IQAir AirVisual.

outputSchema.description: Supported cities returned by IQAir AirVisual.

actions.name: list_supported_countries
actions.description: List countries that currently have active IQAir AirVisual stations.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: One country returned by IQAir AirVisual.

countries.description: Supported country objects returned by IQAir AirVisual.

count.description: Number of countries returned by IQAir AirVisual.

outputSchema.description: Supported countries returned by IQAir AirVisual.

actions.name: list_supported_states
actions.description: List supported states for a country that has active IQAir AirVisual stations.

country.description: The supported country English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing supported states in one country.

state.description: The supported state English name used by IQAir AirVisual.

items.description: One state returned by IQAir AirVisual.

states.description: Supported state objects returned by IQAir AirVisual.

count.description: Number of states returned by IQAir AirVisual.

outputSchema.description: Supported states returned by IQAir AirVisual.
